name: cairn
description: Standalone verification substrate for AI-coordinated software development. Pair with obra/superpowers for end-to-end methodology + verification.

plugins.name: cairn
plugins.description: Verification substrate for AI coding agents: durable memory, append-only verdicts, content-addressed evidence, safe leases. Ships three skills (using-cairn, subagent-driven-development-with-verdicts, verdict-backed-verification) that wrap obra/superpowers with cairn's claim/evidence/verdict lifecycle.
